patch.value: Adopted the pm-brief pattern: return {pmOpsRendered:true,output} for json/markdown and register a toon+json renderer override that unwraps it; return the raw structured object for default toon so the host renders native TOON. PM_OPS_OFFLINE=1 skips npm outdated/audit and gh calls for deterministic CI. verify-release writes the matrix to stdout then throws CommandError on failure so agents get full diagnostics + non-zero exit.

Decision adopted: renderer-override marker pattern is implemented in index.ts (renderedCommandResult/renderCommandResult + toon+json renderer override). PM_OPS_OFFLINE and verify-release stdout-then-throw are also in place.
